steps.title: Spot the positive signal
steps.content: The opening statement says the reception “has been very good,” which tells us the book was received favorably.

steps.title: Match the verb to that positive judgment
steps.content: The word “recommended” describes what people do when they regard something favorably—they publicly endorse it to others. Attacked, overlooked, and misunderstood all contradict the stated positive reception. That matches choice B — B is correct.
